Equities.title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts

Equities.title: Middle-income homebuyers have $30,000 more buying power than a year ago, research finds. It's still not enough
Equities.summary: While the amount that a median-income household can afford is higher than it was a year ago, it is still below the median price for a single-family home.
